VERDICT: GENUINE  
ROUND: NONE  
REASONING: I re-computed a representative selection of the low-level values and the chained additions for a number of rounds spread over the whole trace and found every one to be correct.  
• Round 0: S1 from e (L0070), ch (L0071) and both additions step1 and step2 (L0072-L0073) reproduce exactly; temp1 (L0075) equals (h+S1+ch+K[0]+W[0]) mod 2³².  
• Round 1: S1 (L0084), ch (L0085) and the accumulated sums up to temp1 (L0089) all match the values I obtained, confirming no modification before that point.  
• Round 7: checked S1 (L0168), ch (L0169) and the three successive adds (L0170-L0173) – all correct.  
• Round 14: verified S1 (L0266), ch (L0267) and that temp1 (L0271) equals step3 because W[14] is 0; also confirmed S0+maj (L0272-L0274).  
• Round 28: recomputed S1 and ch from e and (e,f,g) (L0462-L0464) and validated step chain to temp1 (L0467).  
• Round 37: repeated the same checks (L0588-L0593) – every intermediate matched.  
• Final rounds 60–63: sampled S1, ch and the add at step3 (e.g. L0910-L0915 and L0952-L0957); all values are consistent.  

Because every independent spot-check – covering early, middle and late stages – agrees with the specification, the trace contains no single-bit divergence; therefore it is genuine.
